info.name: Daily Zen Quote
info.summary: Daily insipiration and historical events on your dashboard
info.description:
This dashboard widget shows either an inspirational quote or notable historical events, births and deaths on the calendar day. This can be configured is the user's Personal Settings.
The content is provided by [ZenQuotes.io](https://zenquotes.io/). It uses the "Zen Quote of the Day" and "On This Day" APIs and is refreshed daily.
The developer has no affiliation with ZenQuotes.io and is not responsible for the content.
info.author: Martin Hammer
